title: Config 7: adamw width=320 depth=3 batch=128 aug=none
methodology: Generated a 3-hidden-layer MLP with width 320, batch size 128, adamw at lr=0.01, dropout=0.2, weight_decay=0.0, augmentation=none, and label_smoothing=0.02.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
